summary: Phase 62 RE-TEST after fix — VERIFIED. Double AdminLayout bug from iteration_62 is FIXED. /admin/lecturer-profile now renders exactly ONE sidebar (aside=1), ONE mobile bottom nav (nav.md:hidden.fixed=1) and the wrapper testid 'lecturer-profile-page' contains 'lecturer-availability-page' (default Osobní view) + 'my-profile-page'. Toggle Programová/Osobní switches between LecturerAvailabilityPage and ProgramAvailabilityView, both rendered in embedded mode (aside stays at 1 in both). Redirects /admin/availability → /admin/lecturer-profile and /admin/my-profile → /admin/lecturer-profile work; /admin/team is still a standalone route. Sidebar structure matches NAV-1 exactly (Přehled, Programy, Rezervace, Akce, Propagace, Správa group + toggle, Lektorský profil, Statistiky, Nastavení, Superadmin). nav-events label='Akce', nav-mailings label='Propagace'. nav-availability/nav-my-profile/nav-team count=0 in sidebar. Settings hub renders all 5 group nadpisy (general, access, billing, legal, system) and all 8 expected cards (institution, users, notifications, locale, pro, gdpr, vop, audit). Backend lecturer-profile endpoint contract intact: 7/7 pytest cases in test_my_profile_and_naslech_removal.py PASSED. No console errors, no 4xx/5xx API errors during full e2e run. Regression: /admin/programs, /admin/events, /admin/mailings, /admin/statistics all load.
critical_code_review_comments: LecturerProfilePage.js (31 lines): clean composition — single AdminLayout wrapper, both children receive embedded prop. Resolves the iter62 double-layout defect.
MyProfilePage.js: accepts embedded prop and uses renderContent helper (line 119) — correctly returns content WITHOUT AdminLayout when embedded=true. Loader path (line 116) also embedded-aware.

UnifiedAvailabilityPage.js: forwards embedded prop to both LecturerAvailabilityPage (line 61) and inline ProgramAvailabilityView (line 64). Inner ProgramAvailabilityView uses linear pattern `return embedded ? content : <AdminLayout>{content}</AdminLayout>` (line 342) — no IIFE, babel-plugin-safe.
LecturerAvailabilityPage.js: same lineární ternary pattern (line 1106), keeps Dialog as sibling via fragment.

Standalone fallback verified by unchanged route logic — UnifiedAvailabilityPage rendered without `embedded` defaults to false and wraps in AdminLayout, so the redirected /admin/availability path is harmless and any direct render of <UnifiedAvailabilityPage/> still works.

Pre-existing pytest infrastructure issue (NOT phase-62 related): /app/backend/tests/test_unified_availability.py and test_lecturer_availability.py error out with `MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login'` because their fixtures read BASE_URL incorrectly. This is unchanged from prior iterations and orthogonal to the current refactor — backend code itself is untouched and the targeted profile/náslech tests all pass.

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 targeted tests passed; pre-existing BASE_URL fixture bug in 2 unrelated suites is not new)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all FIX-1..5, NAV-1..3, REDIR-1..3, SETTINGS-1, REGRESSION-1, CONSOLE-1 acceptance criteria met

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 62 refactor (admin menu cleanup + LecturerProfilePage composite) is fully verified live on https://school-crm-pilot.preview.emergentagent.com. The double-AdminLayout bug from iteration_62 is gone. If future work touches LecturerProfilePage, MyProfilePage, UnifiedAvailabilityPage or LecturerAvailabilityPage, primary regression check is `await page.locator('aside').count() === 1` on /admin/lecturer-profile after both Programová and Osobní toggle clicks.
rca of the issue: RCA from iter62 (double AdminLayout) was correctly identified and fixed by adding `embedded` prop to MyProfilePage, UnifiedAvailabilityPage, LecturerAvailabilityPage, and the inline ProgramAvailabilityView. Each child now early-returns content when embedded=true, while LecturerProfilePage owns the single <AdminLayout> shell. The IIFE→linear ternary change (`return embedded ? content : <AdminLayout>{content}</AdminLayout>`) prevents babel-plugin-visual-edits parse errors. Live e2e confirmed aside=1, mobile_nav=1, all three nested testids present, toggle preserves single layout, redirects functional, no console/API errors.
